allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('exports:', list\(d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\); print\('main:', d.get\('main',''\)\); print\('module:', d.get\('module',''\)\)")
Bash(sqlite3 travel_runs.db "SELECT id, input_message, status, created_at FROM runs ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;")
Bash(sqlite3 travel_runs.db "SELECT id, phase, status, input_tokens, output_tokens, tool_calls_count FROM agent_calls WHERE run_id='d3a41270-6f7e-4661-9db6-e56377439b0f' ORDER BY rowid;")

Bash(sqlite3 travel_runs.db "SELECT tool_name, input_json, output_text, duration_ms, success FROM tool_calls WHERE run_id='d3a41270-6f7e-4661-9db6-e56377439b0f' AND agent_call_id='6771b851-4767-428e-9993-9ef3f1aeca46' ORDER BY rowid;")

Bash(sqlite3 travel_runs.db "SELECT tool_name, input_json, substr\(output_text, 1, 600\) as output_preview FROM tool_calls WHERE run_id='d3a41270-6f7e-4661-9db6-e56377439b0f' AND agent_call_id='6771b851-4767-428e-9993-9ef3f1aeca46' ORDER BY rowid;")
